title: Out West with the Peppers
actors: Edith Fellows, Dorothy Anne Seese, Dorothy Peterson
plot: The Peppers - widowed Mrs. Pepper and her five children Polly, Ben, Joey, Davie and Phronsie - and the Kings - mining businessman J.H. King and his grandson Jasper King - are still living in the Pepper's small house in Gusty Corne...
